case_title: SOTIRIOU, MICHAEL vs. SALAMY, NABILA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOTIRIOU, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SALAMY, NABILA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-17-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-14-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-28-2000

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2000, OFF CALENDAR FEB 22,2000 OSC POS OFF CALENDAR.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-10-2001, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ELLIOTT M PISOR, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-25-2001 CONTINUED FROM JAN-10-2001 TO MAR-14-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF SOTIRIOU, MICHAEL

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2001, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SHOW CAUSE WHY ENTIRE ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO CRC 225. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ELLIOTT M PISOR. HEARING SET FOR JUN-19-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2001, OFF CALENDAR CASE DISMISSED 6/19/01.
